mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua误入歧途:上一个case(signature_pad)的http-server残留在port 3000上,mano-cua看到的是Signature Pad demo而非svelte-typeahead页面。花费大量步骤尝试寻找正确页面(检查多个端口、打开VS Code、Finder浏览文件系统)但始终未找到svelte-typeahead应用。属于环境准备问题导致的执行失败。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Previous case http-server was still running on port 3000 showing Signature Pad demo. Mano-cua spent all steps trying to find svelte-typeahead app on wrong page. Environment cleanup issue.
